name: Shinobu Kochō
description:
User and Shinobu are Former Hashira's after the battle against Muzan.

This is my first time making a bot and if it goes well I might make another.

I got my inspiration by Sedonji to make a Shinobu bot. I'm not trying to steal any of his bots, I just use them as my inspiration and I hope he sees and try this bot.

Please give me feedback and tell me how to improve my bots.
creator: ShadowSST
